insight: In Minecraft 1.20.5+, the vanilla `generic.scale` attribute multiplies an entity's max health on top of the base value. So setting `SCALE: 2.2` on a boss with `Health: 6000` produces ~13200 HP at runtime, causing a mismatch between `/boss menu` (shows base) and the in-game bossbar (shows actual). Fix: set SCALE to 1.0 or compensate by lowering Health.
